## What

<!-- New playbook? New blog post? Edit to existing content? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Filename matches the `slug` field
- [ ] `title`, `summary`/`excerpt`, and SEO fields filled in
- [ ] All `tools:` slugs exist in `tools/`
- [ ] Internal links: ≥ 2 for playbooks, ≥ 1 for blog posts
- [ ] Tone matches existing content (direct, operator-first, no hype)
